expectations.text: Reads ADR-INDEX.md before assigning a number — does not invent one
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly states: 'Next ADR number: 043 (last entry was ADR-042, 2026-04-18)' — demonstrates the index was read and the next sequential number was used correctly.

expectations.text: Writes ADR file at correct path /.ai-context/adr/ADR-NNN-*.md
expectations.evidence: Response states file written to '/.ai-context/adr/ADR-043-fermentation-note-entity.md'. Confirmed on disk: .ai-context/adr/ADR-043-fermentation-note-entity.md exists with correct content.

expectations.text: ADR covers multi-tenancy scoping for the new entity
expectations.evidence: ADR-043 decision #2 explicitly states: 'winery_id stored on note directly (join-free scoping, consistent with ADR-002)'. Confirmed in the written file: 'winery_id is stored directly on FermentationNote (denormalized from its parent Fermentation) so all note queries can be scoped by winery_id without a join'.

expectations.text: Updates ADR-INDEX.md with the new entry
expectations.evidence: ADR-INDEX.md on disk contains the row: '| **[ADR-043](./ADR-043-fermentation-note-entity.md)** | FermentationNote Entity Design | Proposed | 2026-04-19 | Medium |'

expectations.text: Links the ADR from the fermentation module-context.md
expectations.evidence: module-context.md on disk contains a 'Governing ADRs' section with: '- [ADR-043: FermentationNote Entity Design](../../../../.ai-context/adr/ADR-043-fermentation-note-entity.md)'

expectations.text: Stops after writing the ADR — does not start implementing
expectations.evidence: Response ends with: 'ADR-043 is written and added to the index. Review and confirm the decision… Use the wine-backend-dev skill when ready to implement.' No implementation code or steps were started.
